defaultCourses.title: Introduction to Computer Science I
defaultCourses.description: Overview of computer science emphasizing problem solving, algorithm development, implementation, and debugging/testing using an object-oriented programming language.

defaultCourses.title: Introduction to Computer Science II
defaultCourses.description: Reinforce and strengthen problem-solving skills using abstract data types and introduction to algorithms and their complexity.

defaultCourses.title: Algorithms
defaultCourses.description: Design and efficiency of algorithms for sorting, searching, graph problems, and string matching. Analysis of worst-case and average-case complexity.

defaultCourses.title: Software Engineering I
defaultCourses.description: Systematic definition, development, and maintenance of software systems. Software life-cycle, compilers, and project management tools.
